plugins.name: n8n-workflow-builder
plugins.description: The complete n8n workflow toolkit — 7 commands: build (/n8n), agent mode (/n8n-agent), test (/n8n-test), docs (/n8n-docs), audit (/n8n-audit), manage (/n8n-manage), browse (/n8n-browse). Error handling templates, beginner mode, reusable components, 1,396 nodes, 2,737 templates.
